data.name: customSqlQuery1.Sql
data.value:
select sc_mem_m_chang_request.membership_no ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_mem_m_chang_request.membership_no) mem_name ,sc_mem_m_chang_request.operate_date ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_mem_m_chang_request.operate_date) operate_date_tdate ,sc_mem_m_chang_request.entry_id ,sc_mem_m_member_work_info.salary_amount
,sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.membership_no loan_contract ,'SHR' type_request ,case when sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.shr_value_new > sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.shr_value_old then 'เพิ่มส่งหุ้น '||trim(to_char(sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.shr_value_old,'999,999.00')) when sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.shr_value_new < sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.shr_value_old then 'ลดส่งหุ้น '||trim(to_char(sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.shr_value_old,'999,999.00')) when sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.shr_value_new = sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.shr_value_old then decode( sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.drop_status_last,'0','ชำระปกติ','1','งดส่ง','ชำระปกติ') end value_old_text
,case when sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.shr_value_new > sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.shr_value_old or sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.shr_value_new < sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.shr_value_old then trim(to_char(sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.shr_value_new,'999,999.00')) else decode(sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.drop_status,'0','ชำระปกติ','1','งดส่ง','ชำระปกติ') end value_new_text
,decode( sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.drop_status_last , '1' , 0 , sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.shr_value_old ) as value_old ,decode( sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.drop_status , '1' , 0 , sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.shr_value_new ) as value_new ,sc_mem_m_chang_request.document_no ,nvl( sc_mem_m_chang_request.approve_id , ' ' ) as approve_id
from sc_mem_m_chang_request ,sc_mem_m_chg_share_det ,sc_mem_m_member_work_info
where sc_mem_m_member_work_info.membership_no = sc_mem_m_chang_request.membership_no and sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.document_no = sc_mem_m_chang_request.document_no and sc_mem_m_chang_request.approve_status <> '3' and sc_mem_m_chang_request.operate_date between to_date('03/02/2020') and to_date('03/02/2020') --and sc_mem_m_chang_request.operate_date between to_date('!operate_date_1!') and to_date('!operate_date_2!')
union
select sc_mem_m_chang_request.membership_no ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_mem_m_chang_request.membership_no) mem_name ,sc_mem_m_chang_request.operate_date ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_mem_m_chang_request.operate_date) operate_date_tdate ,sc_mem_m_chang_request.entry_id ,sc_mem_m_member_work_info.salary_amount
,sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.loan_contract ,'LON' type_request ,case when sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.period_payment_new > sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.period_payment_old then 'เพิ่มส่งหนี้ '||trim(to_char(sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.period_payment_old,'999,999.00')) when sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.period_payment_new < sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.period_payment_old then 'ลดส่งหนี้ '||trim(to_char(sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.period_payment_old,'999,999.00')) when sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.period_payment_new = sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.period_payment_old then decode(sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.drop_status_last,'0','ชำระปกติ','1','งดต้นและดอก','2','งดต้น','3','งดดอก','ชำระปกติ') end value_old_text ,case when sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.period_payment_new > sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.period_payment_old or sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.period_payment_new < sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.period_payment_old then trim(to_char(sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.period_payment_new,'999,999.00')) else decode(sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.drop_status,'0','ชำระปกติ','1','งดต้นและดอก','2','งดต้น','3','งดดอก','ชำระปกติ') end value_new_text
,decode( sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.drop_status_last , '0' , sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.period_payment_old , 0 ) as value_old ,decode( sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.drop_status , '0' , sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.period_payment_new , 0 ) as value_new
,sc_mem_m_chang_request.document_no ,nvl( sc_mem_m_chang_request.approve_id , ' ' ) as approve_id
from sc_mem_m_chang_request ,sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det ,sc_mem_m_member_work_info
where sc_mem_m_member_work_info.membership_no = sc_mem_m_chang_request.membership_no and sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.document_no = sc_mem_m_chang_request.document_no and sc_mem_m_chang_request.approve_status <> '3' and sc_mem_m_chang_request.operate_date between to_date('03/02/2020') and to_date('03/02/2020') --and sc_mem_m_chang_request.operate_date between to_date('!operate_date_1!') and to_date('!operate_date_2!') /*where*/ order by operate_date,type_request,document_no
